de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.lemma

Class DefaultLemmaGenerator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.lemma.DefaultLemmaGenerator
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    LemmaGenerator, TacletTranslator
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    GenericRemovingLemmaGenerator

    class DefaultLemmaGenerator
extends Object
implements LemmaGenerator
    The default lemma generator: Supports only certain types of taclets. If a taclet is not supported, the generator throws an exception.

      • getInstantiation

        protected final Term getInstantiation(Taclet owner,
                                      SchemaVariable var,
                                      TermServices services)
        Returns the instantiation for a certain schema variable, i.e. the skolem term that is used for the instantiation.
        Parameters:
        owner - The taclet the schema variable belongs to.
        var - The variable to be instantiated.
        services -
        Returns:
        instantiation of the schema variable var.

      • getInstantation

        private Term getInstantation(Taclet owner,
                             VariableSV var,
                             TermServices services)
        Returns the instantiation of var. In the case that an instantiation does not exist it is created.
        Parameters:
        owner -
        var -
        services -

      • createInstantiation

        private Term createInstantiation(Taclet owner,
                                 SchemaVariable sv,
                                 TermServices services)

      • createInstantiation

        private Term createInstantiation(Taclet owner,
                                 VariableSV sv,
                                 TermServices services)
        Creates the instantiation for a schema variable of type variable, i.e a new logical variable is returned.
        Parameters:
        owner - the taclet the schema variable belongs to.
        sv - the schema variable to be instantiated.
        services - some information about the proof currently considered.
        Returns:
        a term that can be used for instantiating the schema variable.

      • createInstantiation

        private Term createInstantiation(Taclet owner,
                                 TermSV sv,
                                 TermServices services)
        Creates the instantiation for a schema variable of type term. Mainly a skolem function is returned that depends on the prefix of sv.

      • createInstantiation

        private Term createInstantiation(Taclet owner,
                                 FormulaSV sv,
                                 TermServices services)
        Creates the instantiation for a schema variable of type term. Mainly a skolem function is returned that depends on the prefix of sv.

      • createSimpleInstantiation

        private Term createSimpleInstantiation(Taclet owner,
                                       SchemaVariable sv,
                                       TermServices services)
        Since only taclets are supported that contain only FOL-constituents, there is no need to make it also dependend on program variables. (See: Ensuring the Correctness of Lightweight Tactics for JavaCard Dynamic Logic.) This method is used for both Formula schema variables and Term schema variables.

      • createUniqueName

        private Name createUniqueName(TermServices services,
                              String baseName)

      • computeArgSorts

        private Sort[] computeArgSorts(ImmutableSet<SchemaVariable> svSet,
                               TermServices services)

        private Term[] computeArgs(Taclet owner,
                           ImmutableSet<SchemaVariable> svSet,
                           TermServices services)

      • rebuild

        private Term rebuild(Taclet taclet,
                     Term term,
                     TermServices services,
                     HashSet<QuantifiableVariable> boundedVariables)
        Rebuilds a term recursively and replaces all schema variables with skolem terms/variables.

      • replaceOp

        protected Operator replaceOp(Operator op,
                             TermServices services)
        Sometimes operators must be replaced during lemma generation. Override this method to accomplish this in a subclass.

        By default, this method returns the argument op.

        Parameters:
        op - the operator to be replaced, not null
        services - A services object for lookups
        Returns:
        the replacement operator, not null

      • replaceSort

        protected Sort replaceSort(Sort sort,
                           TermServices services)
        Sometimes sorts must be replaced during lemma generation. Override this method to accomplish this in a subclass.

        By default, this method returns the argument sort.

        Parameters:
        sort - the sort to be replaced, not null
        services - A services object for lookups
        Returns:
        the replacement sort, not null
